title: 熱唱！　夏祭りカラオケ

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! Time for a one-on-one with the sea! Catch ya later, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With summer camp in full swing, Hishi Amazon wastes no time in
diving into the sparkling blue waters. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hours later, she still hasn't returned. The sky begins to turn bright red
in the glow of the setting sun, when finally...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I'm back, Teach! It took a while, but I did it!
choice_data_list: I was getting worried. What happened?
I was getting worried. What happened?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I got caught in the outgoing tide while I was swimming, and it swept
me out to sea.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I could've easily swum back by moving out of the current, but this was
a challenge from the ocean to me, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So I faced it head-on! I swam against the current and made it all the
way back by sheer grit! Hah, rip currents ain't got nothin' on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The phrase, "Don't try this at home, folks," unwittingly pops into my
mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I worked up another good sweat today. Let's get going,
Teach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as we're about to leave the beach...

text_block_list.name: Local Resident
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, what a pickle. We're really getting down to the wire here. I've
got to figure something out...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh, sounds like that guy's in a jam. Must be one of the locals.
Hey, you there. Something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Local Resident
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Well, you see, we're supposed to be holding a karaoke contest
at the summer festival this evening.

text_block_list.name: Local Resident
text_block_list.text:
But as it stands now, we simply don't have enough participants. I
guess everyone's too embarrassed to do karaoke out in the open...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, yeah, that sounds like trouble. And I can't ignore a person in
trouble. But as much as I'd like to help...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's probably no point trying to invite people if they're all too shy
to begin with.
You got any bright ideas, Teach?
choice_data_list: How about asking the other camp members?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice one! There'll be plenty of competition if we all join in
together. I get it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That was some quick thinking, Teach. An Umamusume karaoke
contest! Just the idea is gettin' me all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Entry No. 6
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The karaoke contest comes alive with the passionate singing and
dancing of the Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Not too shabby. Well, just keep the stage warm for me. I'm gonna be the one to take the crown.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Course I do. After all, I've got these powerful pipes that you helped me perfect!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
On an outdoor stage, the sky's my only limit. Who could possibly take
me down? As long as nobody busts out with some secret weapon...

text_block_list.name: Entry No. 7
text_block_list.text:
Hello, I'm entry number seven! I'll be performing a duet with Kenta, a
student at the local junior high. Hope you enjoy this special
collaboration!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Ooh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? A duet?! Didn't see that one coming...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And the audience is just eatin' it up! You gotta be kidding me...

text_block_list.name: Entry No. 7
text_block_list.text: Thank you, thank you! Let's see what we scored...

text_block_list.name: Entry No. 7
text_block_list.text: Yay! Ninety-eight points!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ninety-eight?! Th-th-that's crazy. There's no way I can top a duet with a local if I just stick to my usual routine.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So what now? This ain't just about skill anymore. I gotta come up with
a game plan...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, wait. I'm the absolute worst at hashin' out strats...
Anything pop into your mind, Teach?
choice_data_list: You know what they say—an eye for an eye!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya mean? An eye for an eye? So, like, a tooth for a tooth... A
duet for a duet...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what you're gettin' at! If I sing a duet too, then that
levels the playing field. Now I just gotta find the right partner!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it'd make sense to team up with another Umamusume since
concerts are kinda our thing...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna mix things up and go with my gut! My duet partner is
gonna be... you, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I mean, sure, us Umas sing all the time, so we might have
a slight edge...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But you're pairing up with me here! We have something special between us that goes beyond comprehension.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, remember our cook-off? The two of us went pedal to the
metal making totally different kinds of grub.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the feeling I'm gunning for. We were dishing it out left and
right, but it was like we were still a team. That kind of feeling.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I want a one-on-one—in duet form! Where we can tussle and tangle in song and really heat things up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're the only one who could possibly keep up with me. So whaddya
say? Let's sing my song—together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I knew you'd come around! With you on board, this contest's as
good as won!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Let's go, partner!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gents—it's time for the main event! A tag-team
performance is great and all, but how 'bout a sizzling hot session for
that whole summer vibe?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Here comes a special duel—er, duet—from ol' Teach here and yours truly! Play that music loud and proud!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A toast to our epic win—cheers! Haha, I had no idea you could sing
like that, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We fought tooth and nail, and stole that sweet summer spotlight!
Guess our burning passion gave us the edge.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Please, what're you on about? Keep spouting crap like that, and
I'll put ya in a headlock.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we couldn't match each other—just like always. So we
both started doing our own thing, and it turned out great.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the path we finally found. One that belongs to us, and us
alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So don't pull your punches, Teach. Keep comin' at me. We'll keep
serving up those one-on-ones—together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We'll lock horns, duke it out, and then laugh when we win after
charging in guns blazing. So whaddya say? Want a piece of that
action?
choice_data_list: As many pieces as I can get.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Teach...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wait, what's with that wording? I think maybe you're getting a little too into this. But, well...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh. All right—it's a promise! This victory is only the beginning!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose to you, so don't you dare lose to me! We're gonna keep
this one-on-one rollin'! I'll be running at full speed—just try to leave
me in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than lining up neatly, our footprints continue to intertwine like
they're competing. Maybe this is what a three-legged race really
looks like?
